decisions.what: Used template literal for unique animation id combining Date.now() and Math.random().toString()
decisions.why: Specification requires unique IDs for React key tracking and combining timestamp with random value ensures uniqueness even for rapid concurrent spawns.

decisions.what: Used slice(-10) on the animations array to cap concurrent animations to 10
decisions.why: Specification requires limiting to a maximum of 10 concurrent animations; slicing keeps the most recent 10 entries.

decisions.what: Imported only useState from react in App.tsx (omitted useRef)
decisions.why: Specification mentions useRef in the import description but the described logic does not use a ref; importing an unused symbol would violate the project's eslint no-unused-vars rules.

decisions.what: Placed './index.css' import as the first line of main.tsx
decisions.why: Specification 005 explicitly requires the global styles import to be at the top, before other imports, so styles load before component-specific styles.
